007.title: execute_task returns inside _merge_lock causing lock held during cost recording
007.failure_reason: Gemini retry failed: Gemini CLI exited with code 1

hypotheses.claim: Gemini CLI crashes (exit code 1) are caused by oversized orchestrated prompts rather than transient API failures, particularly for tasks that involve restructuring large complex functions
evidence: task-007 failed with Gemini CLI exit code 1 after retry
task-007 involved refactoring lock/return flow in execute_task which is one of the most complex functions
hypotheses.suggested_action: Add prompt size constraint to brain_orchestrate (4000 char limit) and add guidance for decomposing complex control-flow refactoring

hypotheses.claim: executor.py is a hotspot that attracts the most bug fixes and is prone to merge conflicts when multiple tasks touch it in the same session
evidence: task-002 added import json to executor.py
task-007 attempted to modify executor.py execute_task
hypotheses.suggested_action: When planning tasks, avoid scheduling more than 2-3 concurrent tasks that all modify executor.py. Consider splitting executor.py into smaller modules.

hypotheses.claim: The validation environment lacks pytest and has pyrefly misconfigured for third-party imports, making automated quality gates unreliable
evidence: All 6 completed tasks showed pyrefly false positives for rich imports
All tasks showed pytest not available warning
hypotheses.suggested_action: Configure pyrefly to ignore third-party import errors or set up a proper virtual environment with dependencies installed for validation
